series_metadata.series_description: Records include bank deposit slips ledgers, bank statements, cancelled checks and related documents for various cutodial bank accounts administered and monitored by the Department.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until next audit by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved, then destroy. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Electronic: Retain until next audit by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved, then delete., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
